stemHtml:
When 1 hour away from the destination, the pilot receives notification that tornado activity is observed 10 NM from the airport, moving towards the airport and away from the direction in which the aircraft is flying.

Based on this information, the best course of action for the pilot is to...

options.a: continue according to the flight plan, as a typical tornado would pass over the airport in approximately 6 minutes.
options.b: reduce the aircraft speed, as a typical tornado would pass over the airport in approximately 20 to 40 minutes.
options.c: adjust the aircraft speed, as a typical tornado would be over the airport in approximately 90 minutes.
options.d: continue according to the flight plan, as a typical tornado would pass over the airport in approximately 3 minutes.
